_note: Curated odoo.tools symbols for Odoo 8.0 (OpenERP era). safe_eval imported from openerp.tools.safe_eval. image_resize_image and friends available. pycompat present. date_utils absent (introduced v12). No SQL class (v17+). format_datetime/format_amount/get_lang absent (v13+).

symbols.note: Image resize API for v8-v12. Removed in v13 — replaced by odoo.tools.image_process.
Convenience wrapper around image_resize_image for large sizes. Removed v13+.
Convenience wrapper for medium image resize. Removed v13+.
Convenience wrapper for small image resize. Removed v13+.
Unicode string coercion helper. Present through v19 though soft-deprecated in later versions. Still valid to use.
Python 2/3 compatibility shim. Gradually shrinks from v13 onward, deprecated v18, removed from odoo.tools.__init__ in v19.
Compare two floats with decimal precision. Re-exported from odoo.tools.float_utils.
Round a float with decimal precision. Re-exported from odoo.tools.float_utils.
Test if a float is effectively zero within precision. Re-exported from odoo.tools.float_utils.
Escape HTML special characters. In v17+ prefer markupsafe.escape for Markup-aware escaping.

Convert plain text to HTML, escaping special chars and converting newlines to
.
Strip HTML tags and return plain text.
Constant for Odoo server-side date format string.
Constant for Odoo server-side datetime format string.
Context manager to silence specific loggers during tests. Frequently misused — apply only in test scope.
Global Odoo config manager singleton. Access options via odoo.tools.config['option_name'].
